title: Shop All Products | Thermo Fisher Scientific - US

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Page hero with breadcrumb (Home > Products), H1 heading 'Shop All Products', subtitle 'Stay stocked. Keep moving forward.', and CTA button 'Learn more'. Dark purple/blue background with microscopy imagery.

contentSequences.description: Breadcrumb navigation, H1 title, subtitle text, and primary CTA button over dark background image

sections.name: Quick Action Buttons
sections.description: Row of three secondary CTA buttons: Promotions, New products, Order other. Arranged in 3 equal columns.

contentSequences.description: Three equally-spaced secondary buttons for quick navigation

sections.name: Table of Contents Sidebar
sections.description: Left sidebar accordion containing 10 anchor links to product category sections. Sticky positioning.

contentSequences.description: Collapsible table of contents with anchor links to each product category section
elements: 10 anchor links to H2 category sections

sections.name: Laboratory Supplies
sections.description: Product category section with H2 heading, 3-column grid of ~15 product subcategory links, separator, and banner image before next section.

contentSequences.description: 3-column grid of product subcategory links (Beakers and Lids, Bottles Jars and Jugs, Boxes, Burettes, Carboys, Cell Culture Utensils, Clamps and Supports, etc.)
elements: ~15 product subcategory links arranged in 3 columns

contentSequences.description: Horizontal rule separator followed by banner image for next category

sections.name: Laboratory Equipment
sections.description: Product category section with H2, 3-column link grid (~20 subcategory links), separator.

contentSequences.description: 3-column grid of product subcategory links (Baths, Bioprocess Systems, Centrifuges, Cold Storage Products, Desiccators, Evaporators, etc.)

sections.name: Laboratory Instruments
sections.description: Product category section with H2, 3-column link grid (~15 subcategory links).

contentSequences.description: 3-column grid of product subcategory links (Cellular Imaging, Chromatography Systems, Electron Microscopes, etc.)

sections.name: Clinical and Diagnostics
sections.description: Product category section with H2, category banner image (Clinical & Diagnostics), 2-column subcategory link grid.

sections.description: Product category section with H2 and 2-column subcategory link grid.

sections.name: Chemicals
sections.description: Largest product category section with H2, category banner image (Chemicals), 3-column link grid (~30+ subcategory links), separator.

contentSequences.description: 3-column grid of many subcategory links (Acids, Acyl Halides, Biochemical Reagents, Buffers and Standards, etc.)

sections.description: Product category section with H2 and 2-column subcategory link grid.

contentSequences.description: 2-column grid of product subcategory links (Antibiotics and Supplements, Bioprocessing Reagents, etc.)

sections.name: Protein and Cell Analysis
sections.description: Product category section with H2, category banner image (Protein & Cell Analysis), 3-column subcategory link grid.

contentSequences.description: 3-column grid of product subcategory links (Antibodies, Biochemical Reagents, Buffers and Desalting, etc.)

sections.name: Promotional Offers
sections.description: Two side-by-side promotional offer cards. Left: 'Save $750 & get a Mystery Box' with image and 'Shop now' CTA. Right: 'Elevate your shopping with our AI assistant' with image, description, and 'Try it today' CTA.

contentSequences.description: Two promotional cards in a 2-column layout with background images, headlines, and CTA buttons
elements: Promo 1: Image + 'Save $750 & get a Mystery Box until 3/28/26*' + 'Shop now' CTA
Promo 2: Image + 'Elevate your shopping with our AI assistant' + description + 'Try it today' CTA
